## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Superhuman's content strategy, rebranding efforts, and upcoming product changes with GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content priorities: AI-forward articles \> rebrand support \> calendar features](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Superhuman rebranding to "Superhuman Mail" by Oct 29; minimal impact on Grammarly/Coda](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Content audit underway, focusing on high-converting posts and SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Blog architecture changes possible post-launch; current Ghost CMS to remain for now](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Priorities

  - [AI-forward articles remain the top priority](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Calendar features content deprioritized but can be woven into existing narratives](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Content audit in progress, focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [High-converting posts (5-20 keyword positions)](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [SEO opportunities for mail and productivity-related keywords](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Updating both naming, branding, and site links in refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

### Rebranding Updates

  - [New homepage design showcases all products (Mail, Grammarly, Coda, Go)](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Superhuman to be renamed "Superhuman Mail"](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Voice and tone guide for parent company nearly finalized](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [Grammarly brand evolution most significant; overall similar to Superhuman](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Launch impact minimal on Grammarly and Coda](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Technical Changes

  - [New landing page URL to be confirmed (Alex to follow up in Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Blog post links to remain unchanged](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Redirects for updated links to be implemented before Oct 29](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [No immediate CMS changes; Ghost to continue hosting blog short-term](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Potential for more sophisticated blog architecture post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Clarification needed on which Google Analytics instance (Superhuman GA4 or Blog) to use for Looker dashboard updates](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Alex to investigate and respond in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Team Communication

  - [Standing meeting to be rescheduled (Wed/Thu/Fri preferred)](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Harmony and Morgan to be primary POCs for SEO-related matters](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)
  - [Weekly Friday updates to be shared on content performance and impact](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jo to post GA4/Blog analytics question in Slack for Alex to investigate](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Alex to confirm new landing page URL with Bethany and share in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [GrowthX to propose new standing meeting time options](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin sharing weekly Friday updates on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting in \~2 weeks as launch approaches](https://fathom.video/share/_5Dw1d22N-5x62JsyCed2-1Ynzsgk9PV?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
